basic_details.job_title: ICSIL Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Intelligent Communication Systems India (ICSIL) has released the official Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the ICSIL Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a Post Graduate degree in any discipline, B.Tech/ BE/ B.Arch qualification, or a desirable Diploma in Graphic Design/ Visual Arts can apply online until 02-08-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in any discipline, B.Tech/ BE/ B.Arch, Diploma in Graphic Design/Visual Arts (desirable)
qualification.details: Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support): Post graduate in any discipline from a recognized university/institution. OR B.Tech/BE/B.Arch degree from the recognized university. In addition to, Diploma in Graphic Design/Visual Arts from reputed Govt. or private institute is desirable. Proficiency in computer applications, particular MS Power Point, MS Word, and MS Excel.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICSIL Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.intelligent_communication_systems_india_: Post Graduate in any discipline, B.Tech/ BE/ B.Arch, Diploma in Graphic Design/Visual Arts (desirable)

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICSIL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICSIL Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support): Post graduate in any discipline from a recognized university/institution. OR B.Tech/BE/B.Arch degree from the recognized university. In addition to, Diploma in Graphic Design/Visual Arts from reputed Govt. or private institute is desirable. Proficiency in computer applications, particular MS Power Point, MS Word, and MS Excel.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSIL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICSIL Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the ICSIL Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) posts is 02 August 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post Graduate degree in any discipline, or a B.Tech/BE/B.Arch degree. A Diploma in Graphic Design/Visual Arts is desirable, along with computer proficiency.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 46,000/- (without EPF).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ICSIL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 590.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Scrutiny followed by an Interview/Interaction.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the ICSIL Project Associate position?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official ICSIL website or the direct application link provided. The application window is from 18 July 2026 to 02 August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment for the Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job location is New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is ICSIL/RC/10-A/Forest Deptt. (North)/2026-27.
